expectations.evidence: Step 1 covers TTM pages_limit=25600000 with full /etc/modprobe.d/increase_amd_memory.conf config and update-initramfs + reboot
GPU_TARGETS="gfx1150" in build command with explanation
export ROCBLAS_USE_HIPBLASLT=1 with explanation of 2-3x improvement
--no-mmap explained as critical for large models due to HIP page-locking overhead
-ngl 99 with explanation of zero PCIe penalty on unified memory
Q4_K_M recommended, ~40GB size, Q4_0 mentioned as fastest alternative
